tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: AMAZING DOLPHINS
tasks.text:
Dolphins are among 1.1. _________ most intelligent animals on Earth. They live in groups called pods, which can consist 1.2. _________ up to a hundred individuals. Dolphins communicate with 1.3. _________ other by using clicks, whistles, and body movements. Scientists have 1.4. _________ studying dolphin behaviour for decades and they are still discovering new things about these fascinating creatures.

Unlike most fish, dolphins are 1.5. _________ able to breathe underwater. They must come to the surface regularly to get air. A dolphin 1.6. _________ hold its breath for about eight to ten minutes before it needs to breathe again. Baby dolphins, 1.7. _________ are called calves, stay close to their mothers for several years.

Dolphins are known 1.8. _________ their playful nature. They often ride the waves created 1.9. _________ boats and enjoy jumping out of the water. 1.10. _________ of these behaviours help dolphins develop skills they need for hunting and survival.
